text:
Author: skreuzer
Date: Mon Apr 14 19:50:44 2014
New Revision: 351281
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351281
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351281/

Log:
  Add Staging support
  
  PR:		ports/188500
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/py-fsm/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/py-fsm/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-fsm/Makefile	Mon Apr 14 19:46:59 2014	(r351280)
+++ head/devel/py-fsm/Makefile	Mon Apr 14 19:50:44 2014	(r351281)
@@ -19,5 +19,4 @@ USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO=	python_${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-py${PYTHON_VER}.egg-info
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
